sourceAmbiguity: Provider completion callbacks can be confused with the platform closed state.
decisionTaken: Map provider call completion into call_completed and reason TEL_SESSION_188_PROVIDER_COMPLETION_NOT_PLATFORM_CLOSED. Only call_closed moves to the governed platform closed state.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The blueprint states that routine evidence, continuation, request seeding, submission, and closure are separate platform settlements after provider callbacks.
operationalRisk: Treating provider completion as closure would hide recording, transcript, readiness, manual review, or continuation work still in progress.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: If a provider adds richer terminal status fields, update only the edge-to-call-session mapping and keep platform closure governed by call_closed.
